valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Sat 20 Jun 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Sun 21 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: New high expected northern Ireland 1025 by midnight tonight. Low Southeast Iceland 995 losing its identity

Rain and fog patches, then showers.
